title: Add production L2 raw announce dispatch to gateway announce ingestion
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-r9bb added a software-only C announce parser/verifier/ingestion boundary, but the production L2 receive path currently assumes every authenticated LICHEN frame payload is SCHC-compressed IPv6 and injects it via net_recv_data(). Raw spec §9.2 announce routing messages are not represented in the C L2/routing dispatch path, so no RF/native_sim receive hook can honestly call gateway_announce_ingest_verified() yet. What needs to be done: define how raw announce routing payloads are distinguished from SCHC IPv6 payloads in C, add a production dispatch point after authentication and before/alongside IPv6 injection, update C TOFU/peer/gradient routing state, call gateway_announce_ingest_verified() for location app_data, and cover native_sim/qemu injection. Blocked until the C link/L2 payload demux and gradient table ownership are decided.
acceptance_criteria: No-hardware native_sim/qemu tests inject signed announce bytes through the production L2/routing receive path and prove authenticated announces update peer/gradient state and gateway network-location ingestion. RF hardware validation is chained separately.
